{{Infobox group
| name = Frozen Blade school
| introduced = Uncrowned
}}

''See also: [[Frozen Blade school Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Frozen Blade]] school, also known as the [[Frozen Blade]] sect, is a powerful organization headquartered in a snowy region. The sect manages vast territories and serves as a protector for an entire nation, shielding its people from various threats such as invaders, deadly environmental conditions, stray [[Remnants]], and [[aura]]-storms. The sect's home is characterized by a harsh climate where razor-sharp ice blades infused with silver [[sword aura]] emerge from snowbanks near wooden dwellings. Due to the extreme nature of this environment, only Truegolds following the [[Path of the Frozen Blade]] are permitted to visit, as those with lower ranks cannot survive the conditions. The school is led by a [[Sage]] and utilizes specialized combat styles, including [[Ghost-Blades]] who practice a [[Path]] of [[sword]] and death [[madra]]. Members of the school, such as Underladies, are often seen in sky-blue robes and utilize icy blades or blue-sheathed swords. The school's combat techniques involve [[Frozen Blade madra]] and icy [[aura]], which can be used to immobilize opponents or create cutting shards in the air.}}

== Uncrowned ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|The [[Frozen Blade school]] is a group.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c9">''Uncrowned'', chapter 9</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Frozen Blade]] School is a sect remembered by [[Adama]] that maintains its headquarters within a snowy region. The school manages a vast expanse of land where it protects people from environmental threats and invaders, including the defense of a specific snowy village. To ensure safety, members are assigned to shield civilians from [[aura]]-storms and [[Remnants]]. Within the sect's hierarchy, only Truegolds on the [[Path of the Frozen Blade]] are permitted to visit the [[Sage]]'s home. Additionally, members of the school have been noted aboard the [[Akura]] cloudship and as part of an [[Akura backup team]].}}

<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">8</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Frozen Blade]] School is a school that [[Adama]] remembers.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c1">''Wintersteel'', chapter 1</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|Members of the [[Frozen Blade]] School were aboard the [[Akura]] cloudship.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c5">''Wintersteel'', chapter 5</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The headquarters of the [[Frozen Blade]] sect is located in the snow.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c8">''Wintersteel'', chapter 8</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Frozen Blade]] School owns a huge stretch of land and protects people from invaders and the environment.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c8" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|Only Truegolds on the [[Path of the Frozen Blade]] are allowed to visit the [[Sage]]'s home.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c8" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Frozen Blade]] School has members on the [[Akura backup team]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c10">''Wintersteel'', chapter 10</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Frozen Blade]] School protects a snowy village.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c11">''Wintersteel'', chapter 11</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Frozen Blade]] School assigns members to protect civilians from [[Remnants]] or [[aura]]-storms.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c12">''Wintersteel'', chapter 12</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:Uncrowned]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle groups]]
